## Summary

- explain the change in one or more concrete bullets

## Verification

- list the commands you ran

## Risk

- note any rollout impact, migration, or follow-up

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, local env files, or signing material are included
- [ ] Typecheck and relevant tests were run
- [ ] Docs or config examples were updated when behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes were reviewed for abuse, auth, and data exposure
